chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Civil Transfer Application No.S-10 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on M.A No.1478/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 05.03.2026 = None present for the applicants. This transfer application was filed for transfer of Suit No.100/2023 from the Court of learned Senior Civil Judge, Shahdadpur to any other court. Case diaries available online were placed by the Research Officer of this Court, which show that the subject suit has already been partly decreed and partly dismissed vide judgment dated 14.02.2025. Such report is taken on record and in view thereof, the application has become infructuous, which is accordingly dismissed along with the listed applications. JUDGE *Faisal*
